title: Fix unsound assertion in V3Delayed
body: I added this assert in #6300, however it is tripped with #6298 after the new DFG rewrites. Some things change from `BasicDType(7, logic)` to `PackedArray(BasicDType(1, logic), 6, 0)`, which really are the same thing, but I can't seem to find an existing "bool isAssignmentCompatible(aType, bType)" function. I don't want to assert `a->width() == b->width()` as some types might not be packed here at all. Unless you have a way I suggest we just remove the assertion for now.
